workflows.name: SOL & Notice Watchdog
workflows.description: Scan open matters for statute-of-limitations or notice deadlines inside the warning window. For each hit, file a critical filing-readiness task to the lead attorney and stamp the matter with an explanatory note. Idempotent: skips matters that already have an open watchdog task.

actions.text: [sol-watchdog] SOL/notice date {sol_date} is {days_to_sol} days out. Filing-readiness task created for {leadAttorney}.

workflows.name: New Intake Triage
workflows.description: For matters in Intake phase: ensure a lead-attorney assignment task exists (skipped if one is already open), and stamp a triage note with intake age. The 'no intake sits unowned' rule.

actions.text: [intake-triage] Triage run: lead attorney is {leadAttorney}, intake opened {openedDate} ({days_since_opened} days ago).

workflows.name: Stale Matter Sweep
workflows.description: For matters with no activity in more than 21 days, file a reactivation task to the lead attorney and note the gap. Clients notice silence before firms do; this closes that gap.

actions.text: [stale-matter-sweep] No matter activity in {days_since_activity} days (last touch {lastActivity}). Reactivation task filed to {leadAttorney}.
